topic: Parent-hub routing, out-of-box GLM lineage: radical lateral rethinks over the agenda in the packet spec.md.

divergenceCharter: RADICAL and LATERAL over the 8-item agenda in spec.md; do not re-derive the run-1/run-2 keep-1/flip-4 answer

focus: Abolish the hub-router layer entirely (agenda #1): take _apply_deep_skill_routing_layer to its extreme and stress what breaks/improves
noveltyJustification: First lateral pass; tier-split reframe (F4) and four second-order costs (F2) are not in 021/run2-archive/research.md

ruledOut.approach: Set every defaultMode to null as abolition
ruledOut.reason: That is the run-1/run-2 answer wearing a wig; abolition only counts if routerPolicy/routerSignals/bundleRules/defaultResource are also deleted
Lexical regex trick works for deep-loops only because their trigger vocabulary is small and stable; per-hub regex per domain is the distributed monolith in another shape

graphEvents.label: If Layer-1 routing were deleted entirely, what breaks vs improves?
_apply_deep_skill_routing_layer is the one shipped precedent and is non-generalizable
Abolition is a tier-split (cold advisor + hot advisor-loaded vocab), not a deletion

focus: Cross-domain analogies — load-balancer health-check transfer (agenda #3): survey 5 analogies, find the one primitive routing lacks
noveltyJustification: F4 (feedback channel as the genuine transfer, smaller than health-check) and F5 (closed-loop re-frames run-2 measurement gap) are net-new; the four collapse-to-existing findings are confirmatory

ruledOut.approach: OS scheduler priority/preemption as a routing primitive
ruledOut.reason: Priority=today's weight; preemption is incoherent for one-shot routing; aging collapses to learned weights

ruledOut.approach: IP longest-prefix match as a routing primitive
ruledOut.reason: vocabularyClasses already is longest-prefix match by another name

ruledOut.approach: Receptionist ask-don't-guess as a routing primitive
ruledOut.reason: Already shipped as defer; triage protocol is bundleRules

ruledOut.approach: Full health-score routing (F2) as immediate destination
ruledOut.reason: F3 four costs (state-space explosion, grader cost, cold-start, Goodhart) make it multi-release, not refactor

graphEvents.label: Which routing primitive transfers from a non-routing domain, and at what cost?
Each mode has a runtime health score; weights adapt (load-balancer transfer)
The genuine transfer is the feedback channel itself (closed-loop routing), smaller than health-check
Closed-loop routing supplies the measurement infrastructure run-2 said was missing

focus: No-wrong-door/handoff + routing as dialogue (agenda #4+#5): typed handoff dissolves keep-vs-null by making wrong defaults recoverable
noveltyJustification: Typed-handoff contract (F1) and cross-iteration convergence with iter-2 F4 (F5) are net-new and absent from 021/run2-archive/research.md; F2 is a sharpening of run-2 not pure novelty

ruledOut.reason: Without the typed record NWD collapses to today's re-prompt signal; no recovery benefit, only added mode-entry cost

ruledOut.approach: NWD as a replacement for defaultMode:null
ruledOut.reason: NWD is orthogonal to keep-vs-null; both 'default:X recoverable' and 'default:null card-first' are valid under NWD; choice is a cost inequality not a moral judgment

ruledOut.approach: Open-ended clarifying_question as the zero-signal outcome
ruledOut.reason: RaD typed card dominates it whenever N<=3 candidates can be named; open-ended survives only for no-candidates case

graphEvents.label: Does no-wrong-door/handoff dissolve the keep-vs-null distinction? At what cost?
Typed handoff needs routeId/fromMode/toMode/reason/evidence — current router has none of this
Under NWD keep-vs-null dissolves into a cost inequality (one handoff vs one clarification turn)
Routing-as-dialogue card is non-blocking under NWD (wrong pick recoverable); run-2's card was a commitment gate
Cross-iteration convergence: handoff is the typed substrate that turns re-prompt into a first-class closed-loop channel
[from iter 2] The genuine transfer is the feedback channel (closed-loop routing)

focus: Confidence-first + learned/adaptive routing (agenda #2+#6): threshold subsumes defaultMode; learn the vocab-to-mode assignment not the weights
noveltyJustification: The (T,R,P) decomposition (F5) and 'learn the assignment not the weights' (F3) are net-new and load-bearing; F1 is confirmatory; F2 is negative-knowledge

ruledOut.reason: Without recovery, the threshold just reproduces run-2's null-with-card verdict (F2); agenda #6 is radical only as the second turn of a two-turn reframe
weight=4 is uniform across the fleet; nothing to learn; real learning target is the vocabulary-to-mode assignment
Breaks router-replay reproducibility, the only executed-evidence harness (F4.4)

graphEvents.label: Does confidence-first + learned routing make defaultMode meaningless?
Learn the vocabulary-to-mode assignment, not the weights (weights are uniformly 4 = vestigial)
Routing has three orthogonal knobs: Threshold (T), Recovery (R), Provenance (P); defaultMode is one corner of this space
Advisor already emits confidence+threshold+clarifying_question; confidence-first is shipped at Layer 0 for one hub

focus: Contrarian frame-break + radical simplification (agenda #7+#8): defaultMode was a documented bug not a knob; minimal router is (T,R,P)+vocabulary
noveltyJustification: F5 (defaultMode as documented bug) is the load-bearing contrarian claim; F1 (per-field conflation inventory across 7 hubs) is the sourced evidence; F2 (minimal router) falls out for free

ruledOut.approach: Keep defaultMode as a field while adding (T,R,P) alongside
ruledOut.reason: Worst of both worlds — conflation smell persists and new knobs inherit undocumented corners; deletion is load-bearing
defaultMode:X is ambiguous between (T low,R none) and (T low,R handoff); only human classification per hub resolves it
The vocabulary IS the router's discrimination (iter 4 F3); shrinking loses information; simplification target is policy fields not data

graphEvents.label: Is the INTENT_SIGNALS+RESOURCE_MAP scheme load-bearing or an accident?
Smell named: routerPolicy fields conflate three orthogonal concerns (T,R,P) across all 7 hubs
Minimal router = (T,R,P) triple + vocabulary table; defaultMode/defaultResource/bundleRules/outcomes/tieBreak/ambiguityDelta all deleted or relocated
defaultMode was never a design knob — it was a documented bug compensating for the missing recovery primitive
[from iter 4] Routing knob space is (T,R,P)
[from iter 3] Typed handoff is the missing recovery primitive
